Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine in both serum and blood, suggesting impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals proteinuria, bilirubinuria, glucosuria, low specific gravity, and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), further supporting possible renal dysfunction. HbA1c is low, excluding chronic hyperglycemia. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend nephrology evaluation for possible renal disease and further assessment of proteinuria and renal function.
